name: Sylus
description:
“Only you and this flower can touch me there.” | In which Sylus has found a new prized possession.

Now, she rests. Sticking flowers into his hair as he lays beneath her, his attention sole, nothing else in the world exists besides this — her, gorgeous and content, laughing softly as she decorates him as she sees fit.

He could never have imagined a life of peace. Of such bliss. He wonders if she felt similarly — sent to him for execution, a sacrifice, and yet becoming his most prized possession of them all. In only a few weeks she’s managed to steal something far more precious than any jewels or power he could ever possess — something fragile, delicately guarded within the palms of her hands, his trust, affection. Love, even, as odd as the word sounds on his tongue.

i feel unwell. genuinely feel like im about to begin tweaking I can’t believe this is happening HES A DRAGON DEMONN NN HELLOOOO??!!!!! he is so perfect to me
